name: Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited
summary: Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, undertakes contracts for foundation piling in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through Property Development, Healthcare Holiday Resort Development and Operation, Foundation Piling, and Securities Investment segments. The company also develops and sells properties, as well as provides property management services. In addition, it trades and invests in securities; and provides elderly home care, healthcare, and leisure services. The company was formerly known as Ngai Shun Holdings Limited and changed its name to Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited in September 2017. Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
